name: Leather handbag
description:
Hermès Evelyne III 23 – Taurillon Clemence – Gold / Gold Hardware (2026)

Authentic Hermès Evelyne III 23 crafted in luxurious Taurillon Clemence leather in the classic Gold color, complemented by gold hardware.
A highly sought-after piece that has been released only recently, making it especially difficult to find on the market.

Condition:
Very good condition, close to unused. Light signs of handling may be present. The bag remains clean, well-maintained, and ready to use.
Details
- Model: Evelyne III 23
- Material: Taurillon Clemence leather
- Color: Gold
- Hardware: Gold-tone
Size:
- Height: 24 cm (9.4")
- Length: 22.5 cm (8.9")
- Depth: 5.5 cm (2.2")
- Strap Length: Approx. 137 cm

Accessories:
- Original shoulder strap included

A timeless and collectible Hermès piece, perfect for everyday elegance. Ready to ship immediately.
